kill_fact: The 'catalyst' is NOT a dated forcing event — it is an UNDATED sum-of-parts wait. Verified against KDP's own IR: the tax-free spin of Global Coffee Co. has 'exact timing... yet to be determined,' is gated on 'appropriate leverage levels at each company, and supportive market conditions' (a real out-clause), with operational readiness only TARGETED by year-end 2026 and separation merely 'likely early 2027.' There is no Form 10, no record/effective date, no S&P reconstitution date, no hard clock inside any near-term window. The HARD leg (JDE Peet's) already fired Apr 1 2026, so there is NO live arb spread to capture — the deal-break asymmetry is gone and what remains is a patient SoP/re-rate trade, not an event with a binding date. The $28.50 'floor' is a valuation anchor (staple at ~13x + covered ~3% yield), NOT a backstopped recovery/cash value — it can break in a multiple de-rate or a coffee-drag EPS miss. Asymmetry survives (real SoP, real-but-thin floor, R:R ~1.9), but only at low conviction: this is a WATCH/stage setup, not a fire-now dated catalyst.
corrections: (1) 'Catalyst' must be labeled UNDATED/SOFT, not a forcing event — no spread to capture (JDE already closed Apr 1 2026); the bull's 'index-flow on the effective date' has NO date. (2) EPS framing: the Q1 2026 print (reported Apr 23 2026) was adjusted diluted EPS $0.39 for the quarter (beat $0.37 est), net sales $3.98B +9.4%; the dossier's '$1.35 +22.7%' is a TTM/annualized figure, not the Q1 number — keep it but label it TTM to avoid implying a $1.35 quarterly print. (3) Leverage confirmed: $7.18B net debt / 1.5x mgmt leverage pre-close at Mar 31 2026, rising to ~4.5x combined post-JDE — dossier's 4.5x is correct and is the binding gate on the spin. (4) Floor is a valuation anchor, not a hard backstop — do not call it 'verified downside floor' as if recovery-backed.
evidence: Keurig Dr Pepper IR press release (acquisition close + leadership), keurigdrpepper.com: 'KDP has acquired 96.22% of the Shares of JDE Peet's' as of Apr 1 2026; Cofer -> Beverage Co. CEO, Oliveira -> Global Coffee Co. CEO; 'Separation timing will be based on the achievement of key milestones, including appropriate leverage levels at each company, and supportive market conditions'; 'exact timing of the tax-free spin of Global Coffee Co. is yet to be determined' (accessed Jun 22 2026).

Cleary Gottlieb deal note, 'Keurig Dr Pepper Completes $18 Billion Acquisition of JDE Peet's': completion date Apr 1 2026, ~$18B, KDP to separate into two U.S.-listed companies after an interim operating period (accessed Jun 22 2026).

KDP Q1 2026 results, news.keurigdrpepper.com / PRNewswire (Apr 23 2026): JDE Peet's completed Apr 1 2026; net sales $3.98B +9.4%, adj. diluted EPS $0.39 (beat $0.37); net debt $7.18B / 1.5x mgmt leverage at Mar 31 2026; combined net leverage ~4.5x expected post-close; FY26 guide net sales $25.9-26.4B, low-double-digit cc adj-EPS growth.

KDP / industry coverage of the separation timeline: operational readiness targeted by year-end 2026, official separation 'likely to occur in early 2027, subject to market conditions'; structure = tax-free spin-off of Global Coffee Co. (no fixed record/effective/Form-10 date disclosed) (accessed Jun 22 2026).
